cv

Basics

Name Alexander Wansiedler
Label Senior Full Stack Software Engineer
Email alexander@wansiedler.com
Phone +49 176 241 64 141
Telegram wansiedler

Work

  • 2021.01 - Present
    Senior Full Stack Software Engineer
    Ippen Digital Media GmbH
    Lead development for zero-party data collection and big data applications, building scalable microservices, enhancing data pipelines, and integrating frontend frameworks.
    • Architected microservice backend and frontend systems, improving scalability
    • Backend: Transitioned from Django to FastAPI, Node.js with Express/Sequelize to Prisma; utilized ElasticSearch, S3, Docker, GitLab CI/CD, Apache Kafka, and Kubernetes on AWS
    • Frontend: Built and optimized applications using TypeScript, React, Next.js, and Chakra UI, with TDD
  • 2018.11 - 2021.01
    Senior Full Stack Software Engineer / DevOps
    Lexx Software Co. Ltd.
    Developed and managed a high-concurrency crypto-trading platform supporting thousands of assets.
    • Backend: Developed using Golang, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and Redis within Docker Swarm
    • Frontend: Led frontend team, transitioning from Angular (NgRx) to Vue.js (Vuex, Pinia)
  • 2016.06 - 2018.10
    CTO
    esaveRus Ltd.
    Led the integration of Swiss IoT street lighting systems in Russia, managing cross-functional teams and technical documentation.
    • Oversaw hardware/software integration and deployment processes
    • Coordinated cross-functional teams and produced technical documentation
  • 2009.09 - 2015.09
    Senior Full Stack Software Engineer
    Intaro Software
    Developed e-commerce platforms and backend systems, including major projects for the Russian market.
    • Delivered Symfony/Django projects, enhancing e-commerce functionalities
    • Developed PostgreSQL module, improving data retrieval speeds by over 70%

  • 2012.09 - 2016.11

    Moscow, Russia

    Bachelor’s Degree in Linguistics
    Moscow State Linguistic University
  • 2003.09 - 2009.11

    Moscow, Russia

    Master of Computer Science
    Moscow Engineering Physics Institute (MEPhI)
